Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec wcm-supabase-db psql -U supabase_admin -d postgres -c "select count\(*\) as migrations from supabase_migrations.schema_migrations; select count\(*\) as public_users from public.users; select count\(*\) as plans from public.plans;")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=postgres wcm-supabase-db psql -U supabase_admin -d postgres -c "select count\(*\) from public.users; select count\(*\) from public.plans;")

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=postgres wcm-supabase-db psql -U supabase_admin -d postgres -f /tmp/017.sql -c "ALTER TYPE user_role ADD VALUE IF NOT EXISTS 'collaborator';")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=postgres wcm-supabase-db psql -U supabase_admin -d postgres -c "select unnest\(enum_range\(null::user_role\)\);")

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=postgres wcm-supabase-db psql -U supabase_admin -d postgres -c "SELECT slug, ai_credits_month FROM plans ORDER BY price_cents;")
